feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Where can I download SAPGUI for windows?
entry.content:
Hi

I know this question is asked many times before and I have read a lot o threads, but I still doesn't get it.

I have finally got a ABAP trial running on Docker following the Github guide  and even found the FAQ saying: 

  1. Install the SAP GUI that fits to your operating system, attached here.

But nothing is attached?

Other sources direct me to downloading SAPGui from Software Downloads (sap.com), but that requires a S-user. I suppose the purpose of a trial is that it should be available to people not having SAP and thus not having a S-user?

So, where can I get the SAPGui for the ABAP trial?

entry.title: Can I retrieve BKPF values in SAPLFI_ITEMS?
entry.content:
I have an enhancement in Function Module DETERMINE_DUE_DATE which was called in this program SAPLFI_ITEMS. However, the BKPF values were empty. I would like to retrieve the values of LIFNR or vendor since I want to limit my customization under a specific vendor.

If to retrieve the values of RF05A is by using this "ASSIGN (SAPMF05A)RF05A TO ....". How do I do it in BKPF?

entry.title: To print the attached PDF files to a maintenance operation in a new SAP Form Template.
entry.content:
Is it possible to print all the PDF attachment for a maintenance operation in the new form which is being developed similar to Operation Control Ticket? What challenges are there to develop this functionality? 

Can someone tell us the steps or the feasibility for this? Which all configuration needs to be maintained to have or use the new form to appear in the work order print function?

entry.title: MIR4 - Add custom fields in vendor data subscreen 6510 in program SAPLMR1M
entry.content:
Hello guys,

I'm having the request to add custom fields in program SAPLMR1M subscreen 6510 from MIR4 / MIRO transaction.

I already checked tons of posts but I didn't find a clear solution without adapt standard code.

I found some tutorials to add custom tab in MIRO or add custom fields in the header but nothing concerning this specific screen 6510 that concerns the vendor information.

I already checked BADI's MRM_ITEM_CUSTFIELDS or BADI_FDCB_SUBBAS* and also all the user-exist or MIRO transaction

Exit Name Description

LMR1M001 Exit utilisateur dans le contrôle des factures de logistique
LMR1M002 Regroupement des comptes pour détermination comptes EM/EF
LMR1M003 Attribution numéros ds contrôle des factures de logistique
LMR1M004 Contrôle factures logist. : textes postes pour doc. suivants
LMR1M005 Ctrle factures logist. : validation pr enreg. doc. préenreg.
MRMH0001 Contrôle factures logistique : facturation automatique
MRMH0002 Contrôle des factures logistique : message EDI entrant
MRMH0003 Contrôle des factures logistique : revalorisation/RAP
MRMN0001 Edition/Création de messages - contrôle factures logistique
LMR1M006 Contrôle des factures logistique : traiter facture XML

Can you please tell me if anyone already had this kind of request ?
Thank you for your help !

https://www.sapyard.com/steps-to-add-custom-tab-in-standard-miro-item-screen-using-badi-mrm_item_custfields/

https://sapyard.com/add-custom-fields-in-standard-miro-header-screen-through-badi_fdcb_subbas01/

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Vpe511bIsE8

https://abapers.wordpress.com/tag/olmrlist/

entry.title: how to read fields of structures
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

inside a custom report, I need to read some fields that are present in these structures:

 

AFVGD
AFRUD
CAUFVD
VIQMFE
RIWO00
VIQMUR

 

since they are structures, I can't do a Select, are there tables that I can use that are connected to these structures? Or are there Function Modules?


Thank you!

entry.title: Italy edocument - eInvoice with Partner solution - EDOC_ADAPTOR~SET_OUTPUT_DATA
entry.content:
Hello all,

We have implemented BADI EDOC_ADAPTOR and method SET_OUTPUT_DATA and made the custom logic. Changed the values in the structure CS_OUTPUT_DATA. But after upgrading it to EHP8. We are unable to get the XML structure in the change parameter CS_OUTPUT_DATA. 

After EHP8 upgrade, XML version is 1.2.1 and AIF version is 4.

Does anyone have any idea please?

Thanks and Regards,

Sivanantham.

entry.title: Update Header text of PR through Interface
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

I have a requirement to update the Header text of PR (as highlighted in the Image) through Incoming Idoc.

In the incoming Idoc, if the PR is rejected on third party application, they will add the Rejection Comments when rejecting, that rejection comments should be updated here in the PR header text. 

 

Is that possible. I know that these Header text here does not get directly stored in any table and we read that text using the FM READ_TEXT, but  in this case, I want to update that using an Incoming IDOC field. Is that possible.

 

Help Greatly appreciated.

entry.title: No authorization to access service group, You do not have start authorization for R3TR G4BA
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I am developing an ABAP Restful Application with a single database table as source. It is a training application, there should be no problem showing you the list of elements I have created using the ABAP RESTful wizard:

When I publish the service binding (OData V4 - UI) and I want to Preview, a browser page appears but I am not able to press the Go neither Create buttons because of the following error:

I deleted the strict ( 2 ); sentence in the behavior definition but that did not help. Note that service definition and service binding has different names because wizard required to use different names. Have you experienced some error like these before?

entry.title: Fetch data of customer and send to Open text system
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have one simple task to fetch data from KNA1 of fields - Kunnr and name1 and send it to Open text system from sap.

Can you please guide how work on this task? At present I am able to fetch data and store into al11 application server.

Please guide.

entry.title: IW51/IW52 Add two tasks when one action box item is clicked
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a scenario where there is an existing action box item in IW51/52 which when clicked adds a task. The required configuration is already in place for this. Now the requirement is, when the action item is clicked, in addition to adding the configured task, a second task needs to be added.

In other words, one click of an action box item should add two tasks.

Is there any exit or BADI where we can add an additional task?

I tried using the Z function module which is set up in the configuration of the activity. But adding entries in the tables parameter TI_IVIQMSM does not have any effect as the task details in the importing structure I_CUSTOMIZING is appended to the task list after this function module is executed.

Any inputs/suggestions on this would be much appreciated and helpful.

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Rincy

entry.title: Select the file from the desktop and attach the document in Email
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to pick a file from the desktop and send as an attachment via email. Using the Function module so_new_document_att_send_api1 to send the email. Kindly let me know how to read the document and fill the objbin table in the function module.

entry.title: Screen Painter Buttons Are Missing
entry.content:
Hello, I’ve started learning ABAP with the ABAP Developer Edition installed on my virtual machine, but I have an issue: My SAP GUI version appears to be 7.50, and I don’t see the buttons on the left side in the Screen Painter. How can I solve this problem? Do I need to upgrade my SAP GUI to 7.60 or something? As a p-user, how can I access these versions? I urgently need help. Thanks.

(Note: Utilities -> Setting-> Graphical Layout Editor is marked. There is no problem)

entry.title: Web dynpro
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am new to web dynpro , i am creating an Layout where i need to show the Display button in next line 

'But it showing in same line

How to do?

entry.title: Download ALV Report to excel file with expand/collapse functionality
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Is it possible to download the ALV report to excel file with expand/collapse rows and column functionality?

entry.title: xsls file from AL11 convert to internal table in SAP ABAP
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I need to convert .xsls file from AL11 to internal table. I'm using FM - EPS2_GET_DIRECTORY_LISTING to get the files located in one particular folder (AL11). Converting the file into internal table by using the below code. 

TRY.
DATA(lo_xlsx) = NEW cl_fdt_xl_spreadsheet( document_name = lv_file1
xdocument = lv_xls_xstr ).
lo_xlsx->if_fdt_doc_spreadsheet~get_worksheet_names(
IMPORTING
worksheet_names = DATA(lt_excel) ).
CATCH cx_fdt_excel_core.
CLEAR lv_excel.
ENDTRY.

IF lv_excel = abap_true.
CLEAR: lt_dummyfile.
* nested loop required here. because, AL11 will contains multiple files. 1st loop will contain these recores.
* Excel file will contain multiple tabs. for this one also loop reqired.
FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_data_tab> type STANDARD TABLE.
LOOP AT lt_excel INTO DATA(ls_excel).
DATA(lo_ref) = lo_xlsx->if_fdt_doc_spreadsheet~get_itab_from_worksheet( ls_excel ) .
ASSIGN lo_ref->* TO <fs_data_tab>.
MOVE-CORRESPONDING <fs_data_tab> TO lt_dummyfile.
ENDLOOP.
ENDIF.

 

data converting to internal table but currency column is not converting properly (a few records in currency column) 
for example, 0.07 is the value in the file. but it is converting like 7.000000009A-1. Can you please let me know why it is converting like this. How to convert this type of value normal currency.

 

Thanks & Regards
Sathish

entry.title: App Extensibility: Manage Product Master via CDS Extension leads to Gateway Error
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I need to add the filed kzkup from the MARC Table to Manage Product Master App. The Field is available in the CDS View I_ProductPlantBasic with the name  IsCoProduct. Its not available in the views C_Productplant and I_ProductPlantWD. Therefore I want to bring it to these views via CDS Extension. Doing this leads to an internal server. 

C_Productplant is an extensible CDS view which is explicitly mentioned in the extensbilty help for the app:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/bc6b9325fedd4344a84412b2195064fa/ecb59556027ed75fe10000000a441470.html?locale=en-US

Here is my coding for the extension of I_ProductPlantWD

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewAppendName: 'ZIPRDPLANTWD_EXT'
@EndUserText.label: 'Extension for I_ProductPlantWD'
extend view I_ProductPlantWD with ZI_ProductPlantWD_EXT
{
@ObjectModel.readOnly: 'EXTERNAL_CALCULATION'
    Plant.IsCoProduct
}

 

Here is my coding for the extension of C_Productplant

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewAppendName: 'ZCPRDPLANT_EXT'
@EndUserText.label: 'Extension for C_Productplant_EXT'
extend view C_Productplant with ZC_Productplant_EXT
{
    @ObjectModel.readOnly: true
     Plant.IsCoProduct
}


This leads to the following error in the service sap/opu/odata/sap/MD_C_PRODUCT_MAINTAIN_SRV/ :

<error xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata">
<code>0050569259751EE4BA9710043F8A5115</code>
<message xml:lang="en">In the context of Data Services an unknown internal server error occurred</message>
<innererror xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata">
<transactionid>EE663C5CB30C01F0E00671163EABB58C</transactionid>
<timestamp>20241017192511.6704920</timestamp>
<Error_Resolution>
<SAP_Transaction>For backend administrators: use ADT feed reader "SAP Gateway Error Log" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details</SAP_Transaction>
<SAP_Note>See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)</SAP_Note>
</Error_Resolution>
</innererror>
</error>

/IWFND/ERROR_LOG shows:

<ERROR_CONTEXT>
<ERROR_INFO>Element ISCOPRODUCT missing in the entity PROD_PLANT (CORE)</ERROR_INFO>
<ERROR_RESOLUTION>
<SAP_NOTE>See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis</SAP_NOTE>
<LINK_TO_SAP_NOTE>https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736</LINK_TO_SAP_NOTE>
</ERROR_RESOLUTION>
<Exceptions>
<_-IWCOR_-CX_DS_INTERNAL_ERROR>
<Text>In the context of Data Services an unknown internal server error occurred</Text>
<Source>
<Program>SAPMHTTP</Program>
</Source>
</_-IWCOR_-CX_DS_INTERNAL_ERROR>
<LCX_PREPARATION_FAILED>
<Text>See previous in exception chain.</Text>
<Source>
<Program>CL_SADL_MDP_EXPOSURE==========CP</Program>
<Include>CL_SADL_MDP_EXPOSURE==========CM00B</Include>
<Line>53</Line>
</Source>
</LCX_PREPARATION_FAILED>
<CX_SADL_EXPOSURE_COMPILER>
<Text>Error in entity 'C_PRODUCTPLANT(CDS)': Element ISCOPRODUCT missing in the entity PROD_PLANT (CORE)</Text>
<Attributes>
<LIMIT>0</LIMIT>
<MESSAGE_TEXT>Element ISCOPRODUCT missing in the entity PROD_PLANT (CORE)</MESSAGE_TEXT>
<MSGV1>Element ISCOPRODUCT missing in the entity PROD_PLA</MSGV1>
<MSGV2>NT (CORE)</MSGV2>
<TYPED_ENTITY>C_PRODUCTPLANT(CDS)</TYPED_ENTITY>
</Attributes>
<Source>
<Program>CX_SADL_EXPOSURE_COMPILER=====CP</Program>
<Include>CX_SADL_EXPOSURE_COMPILER=====CM004</Include>
<Line>2</Line>
</Source>
</CX_SADL_EXPOSURE_COMPILER>
<CX_SADL_EC_ELEMENT_MISSING>
<Text>Element ISCOPRODUCT missing in the entity PROD_PLANT (CORE)</Text>
<Attributes>
<ELEMENT_NAME>ISCOPRODUCT</ELEMENT_NAME>
<ENTITY_FLAVOR>CORE</ENTITY_FLAVOR>
<ENTITY_NAME>PROD_PLANT</ENTITY_NAME>
</Attributes>
<Source>
<Program>CX_SADL_EC_ELEMENT_MISSING====CP</Program>
<Include>CX_SADL_EC_ELEMENT_MISSING====CM002</Include>
<Line>2</Line>
</Source>
</CX_SADL_EC_ELEMENT_MISSING>
</Exceptions>
<SERVICE_INFO>
<NAMESPACE>/SAP/</NAMESPACE>
<SERVICE_NAME>MD_C_PRODUCT_MAINTAIN_SRV</SERVICE_NAME>
<VERSION>0001</VERSION>
</SERVICE_INFO>
<SYSTEM_INFO>
<REQUEST_URI>/sap/opu/odata/sap/MD_C_PRODUCT_MAINTAIN_SRV/***Hide_due_to_secure_log_level***</REQUEST_URI>
<REMOTE_ADDRESS>10.41.3.134</REMOTE_ADDRESS>
<APPLICATION_SERVER>######_00</APPLICATION_SERVER>
<HUB_VERSION_INFO>######, Rel. 7.58, SAP_GWFND SP01, GWHUB Version 031</HUB_VERSION_INFO>
<BEP_VERSION_INFO>not yet available</BEP_VERSION_INFO>
</SYSTEM_INFO>
</ERROR_CONTEXT>

What am I missing? Thanks for your feedback!

entry.title: CDS combine lines into one
entry.content:
Hi all, 
I need some help. 
I have a CDS view with several lines and I want to combine this lines into one. 
Example

MaterialColumn1Column2Column3
111111Value  
111111 Value 
111111  Value
222222 Value2 
222222  Value2

The expected result:

MaterialColumn1Column2Column3
111111ValueValueValue 
222222 Value2Value2

All the Columns are string fields. 

Maybe someone can give me a tip on how to implement this in CDS

Thanks and best regards, 
Helge

entry.title: Element "timestamp" is not available in my ABAP CDS View ODP Extractor. How to overcome that?
entry.content:
Hello guys,
I have got four date/time fields - the well known "createdAtdate" and "changedAtdate" , and the respective for time "createdTime" and "changedTime". I want to implement some logic - when "changedAt" fields are present my new column timestamp - for delta extractor purposes - to get values from there, otherwise from "createdAt". So far so good, but when I do the annotations there is an error mark...

 

Any ideas what I do wrong? I tried to cast that field, but I am  a little bit unsecured with the syntaxis yet 🙂
I will appreciate any advice!
BR
HH

entry.title: where can I download the latest Adobe LiveCycle Designer for ECC version?
entry.content: Link and install details, thank you

entry.title: Error in Eclipse
entry.content: This error is showing during the installation of ui5 to Eclipse.
